# Solomon Islands Eco Tourism

> A small, considered marketplace pairing affluent purpose-driven travellers with 5-star Solomon Islands eco lodges and active marine conservation projects. Premium 4 to 7 day journeys. Every booking funds reef restoration.

## Positioning
Work. Learn. Restore.

## What we do
We curate 4 to 7 day journeys that pair stays at 5-star eco lodges with hands-on marine conservation work alongside partner projects. Reef survey, coral planting, mangrove planting, marine debris removal. Every booking includes a per-booking impact report.

## Where we operate
Honiara, Munda, Gizo, Kolombangara, Marovo Lagoon, Isabel.

## Pricing
Packages range from $2,500 to $5,000 per guest, all-inclusive of accommodation, conservation experience, inter-island transport, and concierge. Flights to Honiara and traveller insurance are not included.

## How money is split
On a typical $2,500 package: platform 30% ($750), hotel margin 12% ($300), conservation project share 20% of experience fees ($500), accommodation pass-through $1,200, transport pass-through $50.

## Cancellation
60+ days: 90% refund. 30 to 60 days: 50%. 15 to 30 days: 25%. Under 15 days: 0% refund except medical or force majeure (experience fees refunded).

## Insurance
Comprehensive traveller insurance covering medical evacuation is required at booking.

## Contact
hello@solomonislandseco.example
